response:
**Answer:**  
The video game that featured the Houston Rockets player named NBA Sixth Man of the Year in 2012 is **NBA Live 18**.  

This is inferred from the context, which states:  
- "Miller won back-to-back NBA championships with the Miami Heat in 2012 and 2013."  
- "James Harden was named NBA Sixth Man of the Year in 2012 with the Houston Rockets."  
- "NBA Live 18 features James Harden as its cover athlete."  

Thus, the game that included the Houston Rockets player who was named NBA Sixth Man of the Year in 2012 is **NBA Live 18**.
